title: Microsoft UX Design
description: An entry-level specialization that teaches human-centered design, inclusive design principles, and accessibility compliance. Learners use industry-standard tools like Figma, Microsoft PowerPoint, and Fluent 2 to build digital portfolios through practical, hands-on projects.

title: Microsoft IT Support Specialist
description: Troubleshoots technical issues, manages user accounts, and maintains hardware and software. They specialize in configuring and securing Microsoft 365 ecosystems, Windows operating systems, and device management tools.

title: Salesforce Supported Virtual Intern
description: Completed the Salesforce Supported Virtual Internship, gaining hands-on experience with the Salesforce platform, including Trailhead modules and real-world projects.

title: Google Prompting Essentials
description: Gained hands-on practice and learned the basics of prompt engineering and using AI tools to streamline workflows and boost productivity.

title: Google Agile Essentials
description: Understood the basics of Agile and Scrum methodology, an iterative approach to project management and software development that helps teams deliver value to their customers faster. It emphasizes collaboration, flexibility, and continuous improvement.

title: Junior Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Demonstrated an understanding of core security principles and practices, including operating system security, network and device security, and secure computing practices.

title: Python Basics
description: Demonstrated an understanding of basic Python programming concepts, including variables, data types, control structures, functions, and object-oriented programming.

title: CSS Basics
description: Passed the certification test which includes topics on Cascading and Inheritance, styling fundamentals, use of layouts, and boxing of elements.

title: IT Customer Support Basics
description: Demonstrated fundamentals of IT customer support, including the importance of customer service, communication skills, and problem-solving techniques.

title: IT Specialist - Network Security
description: Demonstrated foundational security knowledge and skills, including an understanding of core security principles operating system security, network and device security, and secure computing practices.
